# custom_credentialstore_password (Resource)

Create or update password credential with the specified name in the specified namespace.

The authentication to the client API is implemented via basic credentials, and the payload encryption is mandatory enabled.

**Further documentation:**
<https://help.sap.com/docs/credential-store/sap-credential-store/sap-credential-store>

## Example Usage

```terraform
# create a simple credential password
resource "custom_credentialstore_password" "main" {
  namespace = "some-namespace"
  name      = "some-password"
  value     = "my-s3cr3t"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the credential.
- `namespace` (String) Namespace of the credential.
- `value` (String) Value of the credential.

### Optional

- `metadata` (String) Optional attribute that can be used to store additional information about the credential. The value of the attribute is not processed by the service and is stored as is.
- `type` (String) The credential type.
- `unmodifiable` (Boolean) Indicates whether the attributes of the credential are able to be changed.
- `username` (String) Username associated with the value.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the credential
- `modified_at` (String) The timestamp when the credential was last modified.
